plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plan (1:50), all elevations (1:50), building sections (1:50), roof plan, site plan with coastal setback line
Structural plans — mat foundation plan and details, reinforced concrete frame framing plan, roof structure with coastal wind uplift connections, pool tank structural details
MEP coordination drawings — electrical panel schedule and single-line diagram, lighting plan with coastal IP-rated fixture schedule, plumbing/hydraulic layout with pool plumbing
Solar system drawings — roof panel layout, inverter and battery room plan, feed-in circuit to main panel
Detail sheets — wall sections (coastal cladding system), roof edge / eave details (wind uplift), opening details (wind-rated glazing installation), pool deck waterproofing details
Finish schedule — all surfaces with coastal durability specifications (salt-air environment Class C2M minimum for all metal elements)
Technical specifications document — materials, performance standards, installation requirements, coastal exposure classifications
